title: Hayati Question Pack
description: STUB (M0.1). Field set mirrors the question model in docs/architecture.md §3 and docs/prd.md §7. The enforcing validator ships in M3 (docs/implementation-plan.md); until then this file is the contract, not the enforcement.

packId.description: Stable pack identifier, e.g. tr_playful, tr_respectful, ar_msa_gulf, en

version.description: Monotonically increasing pack version for remote sync

reviewedBy.description: Native register owner who approved this pack (mandatory before shipping; Gulf reviewer for AR — docs/prd.md §7)

depth.description: 1 = icebreaker, 5 = deepest; drives paywall depth gating

seasonalWindow.description: Optional seasonal tag, e.g. ramadan, eid, new_year; absent = evergreen
